'''vapaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabatine|sabatine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabatine|sabatine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vapaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væpæhæth|væpæhæth]] || [[word:væpæhæj|væpæhæj]] || [[word:væpæhæsh|væpæhæsh]] || [[word:væpæhæ|væpæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vapapahath|vapapahath]] || [[word:vapapahaj|vapapahaj]] || [[word:vapapahash|vapapahash]] || [[word:vapapaha|vapapaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vapahath|vapahath]] || [[word:vapahaj|vapahaj]] || [[word:vapahash|vapahash]] || [[word:vapaha|vapaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vapafhath|vapafhath]] || [[word:vapafhaj|vapafhaj]] || [[word:vapafhash|vapafhash]] || [[word:vapafhaf|vapafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vapahatha|vapahatha]] || [[word:vapahaja|vapahaja]] || [[word:vapahasha|vapahasha]] || [[word:vapahaka|vapahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vapahath|vapahath]] || [[word:vapahaj|vapahaj]] || [[word:vapahash|vapahash]] || [[word:vapaha|vapaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vapahathal|vapahathal]] || [[word:vapahajal|vapahajal]] || [[word:vapahashal|vapahashal]] || [[word:vapahakal|vapahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vapahathatha|vapahathatha]] || [[word:vapahajaja|vapahajaja]] || [[word:vapahashasha|vapahashasha]] || [[word:vapahaka|vapahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vapahathan|vapahathan]] || [[word:vapahajan|vapahajan]] || [[word:vapahashan|vapahashan]] || [[word:vapahakan|vapahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vapahathaoro|vapahathaoro]] || [[word:vapahajaoro|vapahajaoro]] || [[word:vapahashaoro|vapahashaoro]] || [[word:vapahakaoro|vapahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
